reviews.review_title: No option for left handed controls?
reviews.review_description:
Am I missing something or is there really no option to use the weapon in your left hand?

To be honest I have not even tested the game. As a diehard leftie I am extremely uncomfortable playing righthanded and will not even try. So it was a quick uninstall for me.

So until there is a lefthanded option this is a hard 1 star for me.

developer_response.body:
Hey!  Thanks for the review and comments.  We are launching the free play test of the Beta that is a massive upgrade to this Alpha we released a while ago.  Play test will be available for free for a limited time starting September 3rd, and the official Beta will release to the store October 3rd. 
In the Beta, you can absolutely change dominant hands, as well as other settings.   If you are interested in trying the pre-released Beta, we've sent you a private link.  Would love to know what you think. Difference is night and day.

reviews.review_description:
Quantum Strike is a game that keeps you on your toes. 😅😂 This game has a lot of cool and advance features and mechanics I haven’t ever seen from other games for a shooter. This game pushes boundaries literally and is so fun especially during co-op. You can literally play almost anywhere and have a great time with the boys. It’s thrilling and exhilarating. With intensity pushing each wave and trying to hold it down with the team or yourself. If you like sweaty shooters, this is the game for you. 
I think this game has been slept on and can’t wait to see what it has in store and get the recognition  it truly deserves.
This game is a must-play for any VR or mixed reality fan. The mixed reality elements take it to a whole new level.

reviews.review_title: A Bold Step into Mixed Reality
reviews.review_description:
Quantum Strike shows immense promise as a mixed reality shooter that blends innovation with a compelling aesthetic. While it’s still in the early stages, the foundation is solid, and the game already offers an enjoyable experience for those willing to accept the growing pains of an early release title. With more polish, expanded content, and fine-tuning, it has the potential to be a standout title in the mixed reality gaming space.

For now, it’s a game for those who want to be part of its journey and are excited to provide feedback to shape its development. If you’re looking for a polished, complete experience, it might be worth waiting until the game exits early access—but if you’re intrigued by the concept and don’t mind a few rough edges, Quantum Strike is well worth exploring.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback!!  Plenty more to come in Q2!

reviews.review_title: So fun!  Excited for what's next
reviews.review_description: This game is so cool!  Not alot of Co-Op mixed reality out there, so its cool to see one on the market.  Excited to see what is to come in the full game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback!  Big things coming this year!

reviews.review_description: This exceptional XR game masterfully blends digital and physical worlds, delivering an immersive and thrilling experience. Its innovative mixed-reality gameplay sets a new standard in the genre, offering players an unparalleled adventure. The game features an awesome survival mode where you can team up with friends to battle zombies in your own home or outplay them in exhilarating XR laser tag matches.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review!  Big things coming this year with the Full release coming Q2.  Looking forward to more great feedback!
